author: @kingflares2
text: In case you were wondering how he died. It was a variety of factors that can happen to anyone. Its brain aneurysm combined with severe triple vessel coronary something. It is pretty wild. I'll make a vid with more permission from relatives. His life was actually interesting. But of all things. This was the calmest death I've seen. I've been to 3 funerals, had people die. Even friends back then who offed themselves. This was one was no blood, no fear on the face, just sleeping. Like you'd have 0 clue he was dead. We just found him, 1-2hours of eating Bun Bo Hue (I can't type viet sorry) dead. After lying down for a nap due to a headache. He was the most fit uncle. Probably the strongest person in my US family. He carried logs at the refugee camps and was in a Boat people doc (in the background, we totally famous). I know he was the strongest, cause he would beat me and my cousins when we were fooling around when we were younger. He'd 1v4 us.
video_title: [Morimens] Spreadsheet Update Posse Tier List 2026 and what is meta/why. On stream review.
